name: INTUITIVE SURGICAL INC
business: Intuitive Surgical sells robotic-assisted surgical systems (da Vinci) and endoluminal systems (Ion), along with instruments, accessories, learning, and services. The company sells to hospitals, healthcare systems, and surgeons globally through direct sales and distributors.

exposures.sentence: Our robotic-assisted platforms extend the care teams capabilities to deliver minimally invasive care.
Our products are subject to regulation as medical devices in the United States under the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act.
Da Vinci 5 has more than 10,000 times the computing power of da Vinci Xi, allowing for innovative new system capabilities and advanced digital experiences.
Rare earth elements are critical to certain components contained in our products, and China is a predominant producer of these materials.

Our information technology systems are critical to the success of our products, help us operate effectively and efficiently, interface with customers, maintain our supply chain and manufacturing operations.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance for da Vinci 5 surgical system for use in all surgical specialties indicated for da Vinci Xi except cardiac and pediatric
catalysts.sentence: In March 2024, we obtained FDA clearance for our da Vinci 5 surgical system, our next-generation multi-port robotic system, for use in all surgical specialties and procedures indicated for da Vinci Xi, except for cardiac and pediatric indications as well as one contraindication related to the use of force feedback in hysterectomy and myomectomy surgical procedures.

catalysts.event: South Korea regulatory clearance for da Vinci 5 surgical system
catalysts.sentence: In October 2024, we obtained regulatory clearance in South Korea for the da Vinci 5 surgical system for use in urologic, general, gynecologic, thoracoscopic, thoracoscopically-assisted cardiotomy, and transoral otolaryngology surgical procedures.

catalysts.event: Japan regulatory clearance for da Vinci 5 surgical system
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, we obtained regulatory clearance in Japan for the da Vinci 5 surgical system for use in all surgical specialties and procedures indicated for da Vinci Xi, except for cardiac indications.

catalysts.event: European certification (EU MDR) for da Vinci 5 surgical system
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we obtained European certification in accordance with the EU MDR for the da Vinci 5 surgical system for adult and pediatric use in minimally invasive endoscopic procedures across abdominopelvic and thoracoscopic surgical procedures, including urologic, gynecologic, and general laparoscopic procedures, excluding the use of force feedback.

catalysts.event: NMPA clearance for Ion endoluminal system in China
catalysts.sentence: In March 2024, we received NMPA regulatory clearance for our Ion endoluminal system in China.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance for da Vinci SP surgical system for cholecystectomy, inguinal hernia repair, appendectomy, and nipple sparing mastectomy
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we obtained FDA clearance for the use of our da Vinci SP surgical system in cholecystectomy, inguinal hernia repair, appendectomy, and nipple sparing mastectomy (NSM) procedures.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance for da Vinci SP surgical system for transanal local excision
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we obtained FDA clearance for the use of our da Vinci SP surgical system in transanal local excision/resection, a form of minimally invasive surgery performed through a natural orifice to avoid abdominal surgical incisions, for select procedures.

catalysts.event: European certification for Ion catheter extension from 5 to 8 uses
catalysts.sentence: In February 2025, we obtained European certification in accordance with the EU MDR to extend the number of uses of our catheter instrument used with our Ion endoluminal system from five to eight uses.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance for SP SureForm 45 stapler
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, we obtained FDA clearance for our SP SureForm 45 stapler and our SP SureForm 45 curved-tip stapler for use with our da Vinci SP surgical system.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance for da Vinci 5 surgical system for selected thoracoscopically-assisted cardiac procedures
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we obtained FDA clearance for the use of our da Vinci 5 surgical system in selected thoracoscopically-assisted cardiac surgical procedures using non-force feedback instruments.
